Class MailEntry

java.lang.Object
dev.chojo.aether.mailing.entities.MailEntry
public abstract class MailEntry extends Object
Represents a registered mail address for a user.

  • Constructor Details

    • MailEntry

      public MailEntry(long userId, MailSource source, String hash, String mailShort, boolean verified, Instant verificationRequested, String verificationCode)

  • Method Details

    • verify

      public abstract void verify()
      Mark this mail as verified.

    • regenerateVerificationCode

      public abstract void regenerateVerificationCode()
      Regenerates the verification code. This also sets verificationRequested to Instant.now() and marks the mail as unverified.

    • userId

      public long userId()
      Get the user id tied to this mail entry.
      Returns:
      the user id

    • source

      public MailSource source()
      Get the source of this mail entry.
      Returns:
      the source

    • hash

      public String hash()
      Get the hash of the mail address.
      Returns:
      the hash

    • mailShort

      public String mailShort()
      Get the shortened mail address (e.g. j.***@g***.com).
      Returns:
      the shortened mail address

    • verified

      public boolean verified()
      Check if this mail address is verified.
      Returns:
      true if verified

    • verificationRequested

      public Instant verificationRequested()
      Get the time when verification was requested.
      Returns:
      the verification requested time

    • verificationCode

      public String verificationCode()
      Get the current verification code.
      Returns:
      the verification code

    • updateUser

      public abstract void updateUser(long user)
      Update the user tied to this mail entry. Regenerates the verification code. This also regenerated the verification code.
      Parameters:
      user - user to update
